instructions: Copy this file into workspace/STORYBOARD.json before planning a new project.
Preserve the scene and shot structure while replacing every placeholder with the real plan.
Use concrete transition logic, motion language, and first/last-frame states so adjacent shots can connect cleanly.

sequenceOverview.structure: Replace with a short description of the sequence structure.
sequenceOverview.escalationRule: Replace with how the sequence builds or transforms over time.

scenes.title: Replace with scene title
scenes.purpose: Replace with what the scene must accomplish.
scenes.emotionalBeat: Replace with the scene's dominant feeling.
scenes.locationAndTime: Replace with the location and time context.
participants: Replace with the people, objects, or forces active in this scene.
scenes.whatChanges: Replace with what shifts by the end of the scene.
scenes.transitionIn: Replace with how the scene begins relative to the previous beat.
scenes.transitionOut: Replace with how the scene hands off to the next beat.

shots.subjectAction: Replace with what the subject or environment is doing.
shots.mood: Replace with the shot's emotional or tonal quality.
continuityDependencies: Replace with a continuity dependency that must survive revisions.
shots.intendedTransition: Replace with how this shot should connect to the next one.
shots.firstFrameState: Replace with the opening frame condition.
shots.lastFrameState: Replace with the closing frame condition.
